## Summary
Weekly calendar/checklist for users to mark training days complete and see streak stats.

## Acceptance criteria
- [ ] Week view aligned to user plan training days (from generated schedule)
- [ ] Toggle complete/incomplete per day
- [ ] Display: completed count this week, current streak
- [ ] Data persisted via checkins API (#8)
- [ ] Reminder copy for marking today (no push notifications in Phase 1)

## Dependencies
- #8 Checkins API
- Cloud plan sync issue (active plan reference)

## Estimate
3 days
